Subject: Last Chance to Try API Hub
Message-ID: <67d2a7943b736_173ff0_2828_e5@worker-mail-7b5645f7df-867fr.mail>
Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary="_000_67d2a7943b736173ff02828e5workermail7b5645f7df867frmail_"

Hey Emil,

As I haven’t heard back, I assume API optimization isn’t a priority for SkogAI right now. If that changes, feel free to reach out and I’d be happy to discuss how API Hub can streamline your workflows and improve API quality.

In the meantime, here’s a short video introduction to APIHUB<https://hello.smartbear.>.

Let me know if we can help in any way.

Kind Regards,
Sean

Sean McCabe   |  Solutions Advisor
